reviews.comment:
Cuando te atienden muy atentos... pero es increíble que después de hacer la fila para cargar, te hagan ponerte en el surtidor y te hagan esperar 20 minutos x que se borra el pibe y otro q está atendiendo otros surtidores se haga cargo de atender 6 vehículos a la vez.

(Translated by Google)
When they serve you, they are very attentive... but it is incredible that after queuing to fill up, they make you stand at the pump and make you wait 20 minutes for the kid to leave and another person who is serving other pumps takes charge of serving 6 vehicles at the same time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBaktXLWVREAE
